english_name: The Epistle of Paul the Apostle to Titus

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu autem loquere quæ decent sanam doctrinam:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: σὺ δὲ λάλει ἃ πρέπει τῇ ὑγιαινούσῃ διδασκαλίᾳ
verses.king_james: But speak thou the things which become sound doctrine:

verses.latin_vulgate: senes ut sobrii sint, pudici, prudentes, sani in fide, in dilectione, in patientia:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: πρεσβύτας νηφαλίους εἶναι σεμνούς σώφρονας ὑγιαίνοντας τῇ πίστει τῇ ἀγάπῃ τῇ ὑπομονῇ
verses.king_james: That the aged men be sober, grave, temperate, sound in faith, in charity, in patience.

verses.latin_vulgate: anus similiter in habitu sancto, non criminatrices, non multo vino servientes, bene docentes:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: πρεσβύτιδας ὡσαύτως ἐν καταστήματι ἱεροπρεπεῖς μὴ διαβόλους μὴ οἴνῳ πολλῷ δεδουλωμένας καλοδιδασκάλους
verses.king_james: The aged women likewise, that *they be* in behaviour as becometh holiness, not false accusers, not given to much wine, teachers of good things;

verses.latin_vulgate: ut prudentiam doceant adolescentulas, ut viros suos ament, filios suos diligant,
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἵνα σωφρονίζωσιν τὰς νέας φιλάνδρους εἶναι φιλοτέκνους
verses.king_james: That they may teach the young women to be sober, to love their husbands, to love their children,

verses.latin_vulgate: prudentes, castas, sobrias, domus curam habentes, benignas, subditas viris suis, ut non blasphemetur verbum Dei.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: σώφρονας ἁγνάς οἰκουρούς ἀγαθάς ὑποτασσομένας τοῖς ἰδίοις ἀνδράσιν ἵνα μὴ ὁ λόγος τοῦ θεοῦ βλασφημῆται
verses.king_james: *To be* discreet, chaste, keepers at home, good, obedient to their own husbands, that the word of God be not blasphemed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Juvenes similiter hortare ut sobrii sint.
verses.king_james: Young men likewise exhort to be sober minded.

verses.latin_vulgate: In omnibus teipsum præbe exemplum bonorum operum, in doctrina, in integritate, in gravitate,
verses.greek_textus_receptus: περὶ πάντα σεαυτὸν παρεχόμενος τύπον καλῶν ἔργων ἐν τῇ διδασκαλίᾳ ἀδιἀφθορίαν σεμνότητα ἀφθαρσιαν
verses.king_james: In all things shewing thyself a pattern of good works: in doctrine *shewing* uncorruptness, gravity, sincerity,

verses.latin_vulgate: verbum sanum, irreprehensibile: ut is qui ex adverso est, vereatur, nihil habens malum dicere de nobis.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: λόγον ὑγιῆ ἀκατάγνωστον ἵνα ὁ ἐξ ἐναντίας ἐντραπῇ μηδὲν ἔχων περὶ ὑμῶν λέγειν φαῦλον
verses.king_james: Sound speech, that cannot be condemned; that he that is of the contrary part may be ashamed, having no evil thing to say of you.

verses.latin_vulgate: Servos dominis suis subditos esse, in omnibus placentes, non contradicentes,
verses.greek_textus_receptus: δούλους ἰδίοις δεσπόταις ὑποτάσσεσθαι ἐν πᾶσιν εὐαρέστους εἶναι μὴ ἀντιλέγοντας
verses.king_james: *Exhort* servants to be obedient unto their own masters, *and* to please *them* well in all *things* ; not answering again;

verses.latin_vulgate: non fraudantes, sed in omnibus fidem bonam ostendentes: ut doctrinam Salvatoris nostri Dei ornent in omnibus.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: μὴ νοσφιζομένους ἀλλὰ πίστιν πᾶσαν ἐνδεικνυμένους ἀγαθήν ἵνα τὴν διδασκαλίαν τοῦ σωτῆρος ὑμῶν θεοῦ κοσμῶσιν ἐν πᾶσιν
verses.king_james: Not purloining, but shewing all good fidelity; that they may adorn the doctrine of God our Saviour in all things.

verses.latin_vulgate: Apparuit enim gratia Dei Salvatoris nostri omnibus hominibus,
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἐπεφάνη γὰρ ἡ χάρις τοῦ θεοῦ ἡ σωτήριος πᾶσιν ἀνθρώποις
verses.king_james: For the grace of God that bringeth salvation hath appeared to all men,

verses.latin_vulgate: erudiens nos, ut abnegantes impietatem, et sæcularia desideria, sobrie, et juste, et pie vivamus in hoc sæculo,
verses.greek_textus_receptus: παιδεύουσα ἡμᾶς ἵνα ἀρνησάμενοι τὴν ἀσέβειαν καὶ τὰς κοσμικὰς ἐπιθυμίας σωφρόνως καὶ δικαίως καὶ εὐσεβῶς ζήσωμεν ἐν τῷ νῦν αἰῶνι
verses.king_james: Teaching us that, denying ungodliness and worldly lusts, we should live soberly, righteously, and godly, in this present world;

verses.latin_vulgate: exspectantes beatam spem, et adventum gloriæ magni Dei, et Salvatoris nostri Jesu Christi:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: προσδεχόμενοι τὴν μακαρίαν ἐλπίδα καὶ ἐπιφάνειαν τῆς δόξης τοῦ μεγάλου θεοῦ καὶ σωτῆρος ἡμῶν ἰησοῦ χριστοῦ
verses.king_james: Looking for that blessed hope, and the glorious appearing of the great God and our Saviour Jesus Christ;

verses.latin_vulgate: qui dedit semetipsum pro nobis, ut nos redimeret ab omni iniquitate, et mundaret sibi populum acceptabilem, sectatorem bonorum operum.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ὃς ἔδωκεν ἑαυτὸν ὑπὲρ ἡμῶν ἵνα λυτρώσηται ἡμᾶς ἀπὸ πάσης ἀνομίας καὶ καθαρίσῃ ἑαυτῷ λαὸν περιούσιον ζηλωτὴν καλῶν ἔργων
verses.king_james: Who gave himself for us, that he might redeem us from all iniquity, and purify unto himself a peculiar people, zealous of good works.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc loquere, et exhortare, et argue cum omni imperio. Nemo te contemnat.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ταῦτα λάλει καὶ παρακάλει καὶ ἔλεγχε μετὰ πάσης ἐπιταγῆς μηδείς σου περιφρονείτω
verses.king_james: These things speak, and exhort, and rebuke with all authority. Let no man despise thee.
